title: Create subset projects from community picture dictionaries
notes: Created from human suggestion #27 (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-06-13). Sophie requested a way for community organisers to create named project-like subsets from a full picture dictionary, initially by manual word/page selection and optionally with an AI-proposed candidate subset from a natural-language description followed by human adjustment. The subset should remain derived from the main picture dictionary: it should inherit page/image content from the canonical dictionary, automatically reflect later main-dictionary image/content updates where possible, and should not expose the normal organiser image-review/regeneration mechanisms directly on the subset because that could create conflicting image curation states. Track UX, data model, provenance, update semantics, naming, edit/retrieve flows, and exercise-source integration for flashcards, word scrambles, crosswords, and related picture-clue activities. Initial roadmap details are in docs/roadmap/picture-dictionaries.md.
